Video.summary: Les Brown, with cameo appearances by Bob Proctor, David Meltzer, Mary Morrissey and special guest, celebrity boxer and motivator, Sugar Ray Leonard
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Les Brown

Video.summary: Admissions tells a transformational tale about what it takes to find lasting peace.
Video.title: Admissions

Video.summary: A wise master is called upon to heal a painfully misguided cyberbully and his tragic victim
Video.title: The Principle

Video.summary: Does sunshine increase desire? Plus, can couples really keep the spark alive as they age? All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - How Aging Couples Can Keep Having Great Sex

Image.alt: Sex Talk - How Aging Couples Can Keep Having Great Sex
Sex Talk - How Aging Couples Can Keep Having Great Sex
Sex Talk - How Aging Couples Can Keep Having Great Sex

Video.summary: Want to know the secrets of great kissers? And we’ll show you what exercise seniors can do to improve their sex lives. Plus dealing with the emotions during a divorce.
Video.title: Sex Talk - The Secrets of Great Kissers

Image.alt: Sex Talk - The Secrets of Great Kissers
Sex Talk - The Secrets of Great Kissers
Sex Talk - The Secrets of Great Kissers

Video.summary: Addiction is neither a choice you make or an unavoidable disease. It’s an attempt to solve a problem. The conundrum is… it almost works.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction
A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction
A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction

Video.summary: Expressions of healthy anger are different from unhealthy anger. Dr. Maté articulates the difference and discusses the increased health risks when healthy anger is repressed.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?
A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?
A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?

Video.summary: What is the meaning of health? In this lesson, you’ll learn what health looks like and how to approach healing with compassionate inquiry and healthy disillusionment.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - What Does Health Look Like?

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - What Does Health Look Like?
A Return To Wholeness - What Does Health Look Like?
A Return To Wholeness - What Does Health Look Like?

Video.summary: Rock & Roll Hall of Fame Inductees, Rod Argent and Colin Blunstone of The Zombies, are today's guests on Life Stories with Marc Hoberman. Rod and Colin talk about their 50 plus years in Rock and Roll as well as their new album. The Legends who are famous for Time of the Season, She's Not There, and many more also offer sage advice for young, aspiring musicians.
Video.title: LSWMH - Rod Argent & Colin Blunstone of The Zombies

Image.alt: LSWMH - Rod Argent & Colin Blunstone of The Zombies
LSWMH - Rod Argent & Colin Blunstone of The Zombies
LSWMH - Rod Argent & Colin Blunstone of The Zombies

Video.summary: American Ninja Warrior Champion Daniel Gil talks about training, competition, homeschooling, and more.
Video.title: LSWMH - Daniel Gil

Video.summary: Legendary Hip Hop artist Kurtis Blow talks about his humble beginnings. He speaks about his career in Hip Hop and how he is continuing to help others as he follows his passion.
Video.title: LSWMH - Kurtis Blow

Video.summary: Charis Michelsen talks about her experience in modeling and acting. Charis also shares some exciting news about her newest projects.
Video.title: LSWMH - Charis Michelsen

Video.summary: Join Lisa Garr and her panel of guests, musician Chris Pierce, technology expert Moses Ma, and internationally noted biochemist Fred Brown. Today they talk about the science behind vaccines as well as “United We Rise,” a new collaborative song which honors the more than 300,000 lives lost during the pandemic.
Video.title: The Aware Show - United We Rise

Image.alt: The Aware Show - United We Rise
The Aware Show - United We Rise
The Aware Show - United We Rise

Video.summary: Today Lisa speaks with Udo Erasmus, best-selling author of “Fats that Heal, Fats that Kill.” As an expert in health and healing, he talks about the true meaning behind loneliness and ways to reconnect to the self and live a life of thriving!
Video.title: The Aware Show - Reframing Loneliness

Video.summary: Today Lisa talks with best-selling author and coach Christy Whitman about how to manifest your dreams. Her upcoming book is “The Desire Factor: How to Embrace Your Materialistic Nature to Reclaim Your Full Spiritual Power.” Christy shares proven methods for bringing your desires into your life. Info: christywhitman.com.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Manifesting Your Desires

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Manifesting Your Desires
The Aware Show - Manifesting Your Desires
The Aware Show - Manifesting Your Desires

Video.summary: In this episode, we’ll talk with the chair of last year’s American Heart Association Scientific Sessions on new diet guidelines and programs to combat health inequity. We’ll also share tips on improving your heart health and identifying potential symptoms of heart damage and disease.
Video.title: Improving Heart Health

Video.summary: In this episode, we’ll talk with several experts on the often stigmatized topic of sexual intimacy among older adults. We’ll also share information on how seniors can slow the spread of Parkinson’s disease, deal with symptoms of menopause, and reduce their risk of Alzheimer’s.
Video.title: Health Tips for Seniors

Video.summary: In this episode, we’ll cover common public health issues caused by smog, pollen, and other environmental hazards. We’ll also discuss how to avoid Lyme disease, West Nile virus, and sinusitis.
Video.title: Health and the Environment

Video.summary: In this episode, we’ll speak with experts on how the lack of accessibility to basic healthcare has affected people around the country, as well as what steps can be taken to ensure greater health equity.
Video.title: Fighting Health Inequity

Video.summary: In this episode, we’ll talk with a former cancer patient who was treated with psilocybin about his experiences, as well as a psychiatry professor who has spent decades researching the effects of medical hallucinogens.
Video.title: Drug Treatment and Therapy

Video.summary: In this episode, we’ll be discussing the dangers of drug abuse and addiction, speaking with doctors and survivors of opioid abuse on the factors behind the recent spike in addiction across the country.
Video.title: Drug Abuse and Overdoses

Video.summary: Day one of our challenge centers around commitment, so Kino is asking you start by going all in on 31 days of practice with her.
Video.title: Day 1: Yoga is Commitment

Video.summary: Tune in and learn alignment and articulation in the body that will help you tap into new levels of strength.
Video.title: Day 2: Strength Plank

Video.summary: Venture deep into the realm of body and mind in this sequence focused on an experience of santosha, the yogic notion of contentment.
Video.title: Day 3 Acceptance/Contentment Upward Facing Dog

Video.summary: Day 4 is about finding balance.
Video.title: Day 4: Balance Tree Pose

Video.summary: The team, led by Anand, prepare for their motorcycle adventure to the four sacred peaks. The first practice ride is here in the birthplace of yoga, but it is not encouraging as monsoons are destroying roads and villages, Fred seems a liability and Ryan's seizures could be an issue.
Video.title: Road to Dharma - Quantum Leaps in Rishikesh

Image.alt: Road to Dharma - Quantum Leaps in Rishikesh
Road to Dharma - Quantum Leaps in Rishikesh
Road to Dharma - Quantum Leaps in Rishikesh

Video.summary: Jen and Jeff’s dream is to save their marriage on this journey, but it’s clear they are in different mindsets from the beginning. We are reminded that Anand himself had a prophecy of death and his teachers and life adventures helped guide him to freedom. Heading towards Kedarnath, night’s darkness sets in and Ryan sees someone Flip over their handlebars…
Video.title: Road to Dharma - End of Stories - A Trechorous Night

Image.alt: Road to Dharma - End of Stories - A Trechorous Night
Road to Dharma - End of Stories - A Trechorous Night
Road to Dharma - End of Stories - A Trechorous Night

Video.summary: Our first glimpse of the first peak, Kedarnath, the temple of death. Anand reminds us that What needs to die is part of the ego, fears, and comforts. Ken thinks people are riding recklessly, Mario takes his first spill, injuring his passenger Aizhan. Jeff ‘s comments further alienate Jen, but motivate her to rise up to greatness…
Video.title: Death of Ego at Kedarnath

Video.summary: Emptiness and Power in the Gap. The stunning Tungnath Peak at 13,000 ft, the Feminine Temple above the Masculine. Ken goes from rational doubter to having an experience beyond understanding that relates to his deceased sister. Unfortunately, the experience is tainted by ignorance and the seemingly inspiring day is further marred when Anna has an accident…
Video.title: Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath

Image.alt: Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath
Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath
Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath

Video.summary: Ryan puts out prayer flags for the people who helped finance his trip, a stark contrast to the ungrateful Elle caught in blame. Warm day quickly turns cold and many are complaining about wet bedding and frigid conditions. This is Kedarnath, going beyond fickle circumstances. Ken, the newbie to spirituality isn’t so on board and his passenger Tiffany a mom with a 3 year-old, fears losing her life.
Video.title: Road to Dharma - Inner Violence Waiting to Happen

Image.alt: Road to Dharma - Inner Violence Waiting to Happen
Road to Dharma - Inner Violence Waiting to Happen
Road to Dharma - Inner Violence Waiting to Happen

Video.summary: Badrinath – Reverberating with thousands of years of yogic wisdom… But Jeff won’t even wear a helmet. You try and talk to him, he won’t listen to me, says Jen. The ebb and flow of relationships and how to sustain them is found here in Badrinath, the temple of Naryana, the sustainer. This isn’t religious, it is all about getting empty and receiving the wisdom of the sages in the great Himalayas.
Video.title: Real Love at Badrinath

Video.summary: The stages of grief describe, not prescribe—there’s no timeline or map. Grief moves and changes, and you don’t have to make it smaller to heal. This lesson explores the sixth stage, meaning, and how you can grow through loss, honoring your feelings while discovering purpose in your own time.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 10

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 10
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 10
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 10

Video.summary: Through guided visualization, explore a conversation with death to find comfort and clarity. Reflect on the “after” that follows loss and the collective grief of COVID-19, remembering it’s okay to not be okay—and that you can shape what comes next.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart - Bonus Episode

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart - Bonus Episode
Help for the Hurting Heart - Bonus Episode
Help for the Hurting Heart - Bonus Episode

Video.summary: Grief often lives in the body, not just the mind. This introduction to Grief Yoga blends movement, breath, and sound to support emotional release and healing—focusing not on flexibility, but on safely processing and freeing stored pain.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Grief Yoga Part 1 - Channeling Anger & Fear into Power

Image.alt: Grief Yoga Part 1 - Channeling Anger & Fear into Power
Grief Yoga Part 1 - Channeling Anger & Fear into Power
Grief Yoga Part 1 - Channeling Anger & Fear into Power

Video.summary: To transform sadness into love, you must allow grief to move through you. This guided practice creates space for your emotions to flow, helping you release pain and gently expand back into love.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Grief Yoga Part 2 - Transforming Sadness Into Love

Image.alt: Grief Yoga Part 2 - Transforming Sadness Into Love
Grief Yoga Part 2 - Transforming Sadness Into Love
Grief Yoga Part 2 - Transforming Sadness Into Love

Video.summary: Guilt can feel heavy, but it can also guide growth. Learn how to use guilt as a moral compass—taking responsibility in a way that transforms secrecy and shame into self-awareness, repair, and grace.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Grief Yoga Part 3 - Transforming Guilt to Grace

Image.alt: Grief Yoga Part 3 - Transforming Guilt to Grace
Grief Yoga Part 3 - Transforming Guilt to Grace
Grief Yoga Part 3 - Transforming Guilt to Grace
